app.title: World Cup 2026 Pool
app.subtitle: Make your predictions and compete with friends

auth.name: Name
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email to receive the reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: Reset email sent! Check your inbox.
auth.nameInUse: This name is already in use. Choose another.
auth.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Check your data and try again.
auth.networkError: Could not connect. If you opened from WhatsApp or Instagram, tap the 3 dots and choose "Open in Chrome" or "Open in Safari".
auth.inAppBrowserWarning: ⚠️ You are using an in-app browser (WhatsApp/Instagram) which may block signup. Tap the 3 dots at the top and choose "Open in Chrome" or "Open in Safari".

reset.title: New Password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password
reset.linkExpired: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

approval.title: Awaiting approval
approval.message:
Your account was created successfully!
Send a Pix of R$ 200 to CPF 100.928.167-46 to access the pool.

home.title: World Cup 2026
home.subtitle: Bet on all games by group
home.nothingToSave: No predictions filled in to save.

bets.title: My Bets
bets.noPredictions: You haven't made any predictions yet.

knockout.title: Knockout
knockout.predictionsNotice: Knockout predictions will be available once the official matchups are defined.

extras.title: Extras
extras.championDesc: Choose who will be the 2026 World Cup champion. Worth <1>100 points</1>!
extras.topScorerDesc: Choose who will be the top scorer of the 2026 World Cup. Worth 50 points!
extras.mvpDesc: Choose who will be the MVP of the 2026 World Cup. Worth 50 points!
extras.cupStarted: The World Cup has started. You can no longer change this prediction.
extras.cupStartedChampion: The World Cup has started. You can no longer change the champion prediction.
extras.squadNotAvailable: Squad not yet available — type manually.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.noParticipants: No participants in the ranking yet.
ranking.noCustomRankings: You haven't created any custom ranking yet.
ranking.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this ranking? This action cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile
profile.tiebreakerNote: Tiebreaker: when points are tied, whoever has more exact scores ranks higher.
profile.rule1: Bets are locked at the start time of each match.
profile.rule2: Champion, top scorer, and MVP predictions are locked after the first match of the World Cup.
profile.rule3: In knockout rounds, consider the score after regular time + extra time (no penalties).
profile.prizesRound1Desc: Highest score counting only Round 1 matches
profile.prizesPhase1Desc: Highest score across all group stage matches (Rounds 1 + 2 + 3)
profile.prizesPhase2Desc: Sum of knockout matches (Round of 32 through Final, including 3rd place play-off) + Champion, Top Scorer and MVP hits
profile.howGames1: View all matches organized by group. Tap a match to open the prediction screen.
profile.howGames2: Enter your predicted score and save. You can change your prediction anytime before kickoff.
profile.howGames3: Once the match starts, predictions are automatically locked.
profile.howBets1: Track all your predictions with results and points for each one.
profile.howBets2: Use the search to find predictions by team.
profile.howBets3: When you tap an in-progress match, three tabs become available:
profile.howBets4: My Prediction — view (and edit, if still open) your prediction for the match.
profile.howBets5: Predictions — see all participants' predictions with name search. Each prediction shows a colored badge for the score (green = 25pts, blue = 18 or 12pts, teal = 16pts non-exact draw, yellow = 10pts, red = 0pts).
profile.howBets6: Statistics — trend chart (% home win, draw, away win), the 3 most-bet scores, and after the match ends, the points distribution.
profile.howExtras1: Pick your Champion, Top Scorer, and MVP predictions before the World Cup starts.
profile.howExtras2: After the first match, these predictions are locked and cannot be changed.
profile.howRanking1: Follow the overall leaderboard of all pool participants.
profile.howRanking2: In 'My Rankings', you can create custom rankings by selecting specific participants (e.g., family, coworkers).
profile.howRanking3: To create one: tap 'Create Ranking', give it a name, select participants, and save.
profile.pixDescription: Enter your PIX key to receive prizes. It can be CPF, email, phone, or random key.
profile.notificationsEnabled: ✅ Notifications enabled. You'll be notified before matches and about pending predictions.
profile.notificationsBlocked: 🚫 Notifications blocked. To reactivate, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.
profile.notificationsDescription: Enable notifications to receive alerts before matches and reminders for pending predictions.
profile.notificationsDenied: Notifications blocked by the browser. Unblock in browser settings.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.knockoutNote: For knockout, enter the score after regular time + extra time (no penalties).

notifications.bannerDescription: Receive alerts before matches so you don't forget your predictions. We'll also notify you if you haven't chosen Champion, Top Scorer, or MVP!

install.title: 📲 Install the Cup Pool!
install.description: Use it as an app on your phone, with a home screen icon and full screen.
install.iosStep1: Tap the <1>Share</1> button on the bottom bar
install.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap <1>Add to Home Screen</1>
install.iosStep3: Tap <1>Add</1> in the top right corner
install.androidStep1: Tap the menu (three dots) in the top corner
install.androidStep2: Tap <1>"Install app"</1> or <1>"Add to Home Screen"</1>
